hero.headline: We build world-class software & scale your team with senior talent.
hero.subtext: From staff augmentation to full project delivery — we adapt to you.

softwareDev.title: Software Development
softwareDev.desc: We build scalable, high-quality software tailored to your business needs, from MVPs to enterprise platforms.

staffAug.title: Staff Augmentation
staffAug.desc: We provide senior engineers, designers, and scrum masters that integrate seamlessly into your team.

uxui.title: UX/UI Design
uxui.desc: We transform ideas into intuitive, pixel-perfect interfaces that users love.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.desc: Strategic tech consulting for businesses of every size — we help you make the right decisions at every stage.

recruitment.title: IT Recruitment
recruitment.desc: We source and place top-tier tech talent quickly, tailored to your specific requirements.

ai.title: AI Consulting
ai.desc: We help businesses unlock the real value of AI — from strategy and LLM integration to full AI-powered product development.

aiSection.title: AI First. Always.
aiSection.subtitle: We don't bolt AI on at the end. We architect for it from day one.

strategy.title: AI Strategy & Roadmap
strategy.desc: We help you identify where AI creates real value in your business — no hype, just ROI.

llm.title: LLM Integration
llm.desc: We integrate models like GPT-4, Claude, and Gemini into your existing products and workflows.

product.title: AI-Powered Product Development
product.desc: We build SaaS products with AI at the core — from idea to production.

automation.title: Process Automation with AI
automation.desc: We replace manual, repetitive processes with intelligent AI agents that work 24/7.

fixed.title: Fixed Price
fixed.desc: All requirements, timelines, scope, and costs defined upfront. Predictable, reliable, zero surprises.

timeAndMaterial.title: Time & Material
timeAndMaterial.desc: Flexible budget based on time spent. Fixed hourly rate, variable hours — ideal for evolving projects.

experience.title: We Have Experience
experience.desc: Multidisciplinary team with collaborative knowledge and experience with top clients.

agile.title: Agile Culture
agile.desc: Our teams are trained in agile methodologies to consistently meet delivery expectations.

adaptability.title: Adaptability
adaptability.desc: Simple billing, flexible time bands, easy onboarding. We adapt to you, not the other way around.

monitoring.title: Monitoring & Training
monitoring.desc: Personal and professional follow-up at every stage. We're partners, not vendors.

t1.quote: With SeaJah's engineering teams, we streamlined the development of our new app significantly.
t1.author: CTO at Lagom

t2.quote: They always go the extra mile. Everything within their power for the success of the project.
t2.author: VP Engineering at iutrace

t3.quote: Their work automated our processes, allowing us to save substantially on operating costs.
t3.author: Product Lead at Trick

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.
